### FileKit.jar's filepath

The core engine *FileKit.jar* should be placed inside resources/binaries/FileKit.jar

### Compilation Notes

* Before running *npm start*, we need to make sure that *FileKit.jar* is put in resources/binaries/ folder.
* FileKit.jar should be generated with respected to the system's architecture.
* Re-compile the java files and create a jar file (Refer to CLI_README.md)
* Place the generated FileKit.jar inside binaries/ folder.
* Only then the GUI program runs.
